_README: Citation manifest for the archived primary sources cited by the PM&A papers. The full-text article snapshots are NOT re-hosted here (they are third-party copyrighted material); each entry links to the publisher's canonical record (DOI/PMID) and to an archived snapshot served at holisticquality.io/receipts for link-rot protection. The snapshot SHA-256 lets a reader confirm the archived copy is unmodified.

cacciottolo-2017-whims-apoe.title: Cacciottolo et al. 2017, Translational Psychiatry — PM, APOE & cognitive impairment in older women

chen-2017-roads-dementia.title: Chen et al. 2017, The Lancet — living near major roads & incidence of dementia (PMID 28063597)

huang-2025-pm25-dementia-burden-of-proof.title: Huang et al. 2025, Nature Aging — Burden of Proof PM2.5→dementia meta-analysis

klepeis-2001-nhaps.title: Klepeis et al. 2001, J Exposure Sci Environ Epidemiol — NHAPS

lancet-ph-2025-pm-dementia-meta.title: Lancet Planetary Health 2025 — long-term air pollution & incident dementia meta-analysis (PMID 40716448)

livingston-2020-lancet-commission.title: Livingston et al. 2020, The Lancet — Dementia prevention 2020 Lancet Commission report (PMID 32738937)

shi-2020-medicare-pm25-dementia.title: Shi et al. 2020, Lancet Planetary Health — PM2.5 & neurological disorders, Medicare (PMID 33091388)

grande-2020-cvd-airpollution-dementia.title: Grande et al. 2020, JAMA Neurology — CVD & long-term air pollution with dementia risk (PMID 32227140)

sahu-2021-pm-app-ps1-amyloid.title: Sahu et al. 2021, J Alzheimer's Disease — PM2.5 exacerbates Aβ plaque & gliosis in APP/PS1 mice (PMID 33554902)

wilker-2023-bmj-airpollution-dementia.title: Wilker et al. 2023, BMJ — ambient air pollution & clinical dementia meta-analysis (PMID 37019461)

oberdorster-2004-ultrafine-particle-brai.title: Oberdörster et al. 2004, Inhalation Toxicology — translocation of inhaled ultrafine particles to the brain (PMID 15204759)

maher-2016-magnetite-brain-nanoparticles.title: Maher et al. 2016, PNAS — magnetite pollution nanoparticles in the human brain (PMID 27601646)
